news.paragraph: Uber is expanding its strategic reach through new partnerships with Ulta and Expedia while exploring ways to leverage its driver network for autonomous vehicle sensor data. The stock also recently received an analyst upgrade, though discussions regarding its valuation continue. No immediate earnings or regulatory catalysts are indicated in the current news cycle.
